commands.review_summary:
Adds a generated SHA-256 baseline, package scripts, changed-scope routing, workflow wiring, docs, and tests for sessions/transcripts SQLite schema drift.

PR surface: Tests +136, Config +15, Generated +5, Other +202. Total +358 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer automation guard rather than a runtime bug report. The relevant proof path is source inspection plus exact-head CI output for the new baseline row.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide whether to accept the added CI row and coordinate landing with the stacked SQLite storage flip; there is no narrow autonomous repair to queue from this review.

target.title: chore: guard SQLite session schema drift
target.body:
Stacked on: openclaw/openclaw#98236
Related: openclaw/openclaw#88838

## What Problem This Solves

Resolves a maintenance problem where sessions/transcripts SQLite schema changes can blend into larger PRs without an explicit drift signal. Schema growth in this area should be rare and intentional because it affects persisted session identity and transcript storage.

## Why This Change Was Made

This adds a generated SHA-256 baseline for only the sessions, conversations, and transcript objects in the per-agent SQLite schema. The check intentionally excludes unrelated agent DB tables such as cache, auth, and memory tables, and it runs as a dedicated CI row plus local changed-scope guard.

## User Impact

No direct runtime behavior changes. Maintainers get a clear CI failure when a PR changes the SQLite sessions/transcripts schema, with a documented regeneration command for intentional schema updates.

## Evidence

- `pnpm sqlite:sessions-schema:check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/state/sqlite-session-schema-baseline.test.ts test/scripts/changed-lanes.test.ts test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/state/sqlite-session-schema-baseline.ts src/state/sqlite-session-schema-baseline.test.ts scripts/generate-sqlite-session-schema-baseline.ts scripts/check-changed.mjs test/scripts/changed-lanes.test.ts test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/generate-sqlite-session-schema-baseline.ts scripts/check-changed.mjs test/scripts/changed-lanes.test.ts test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/state/sqlite-session-schema-baseline.ts src/state/sqlite-session-schema-baseline.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `git diff --check`
- Autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported.
target.author: jalehman
